title: Recruiter Screens, Written Communication, and Process Control · Opportunity Brief: Question Clarification
summary: A fast screening call mixes role interest, evidence, compensation, location, authorization, accommodations, private history, and unclear next steps. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the question clarification increment in screening conversation and process record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Clarify ambiguous role, level, process, location, schedule, compensation, work sample, and decision criteria before answering.
Deliver a flexible evidence-grounded introduction connecting target work, relevant behavior, proof, and reason for this conversation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Question Clarification · Theory Question Clarification
steps.instruction:
theory case — A rushed screen mixes role evidence, pay, location, authorization, access, sensitive history, unclear process, and an implied but unconfirmed next step. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Question Clarification contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Question Clarification · Theory Question Clarification.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for clarify ambiguous role, level, process, location, schedule, compensation, work sample, and decision criteria before answering. For Predict Question Clarification · Theory Question Clarification, keep Question Clarification connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Question Clarification while producing screening conversation and process record.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A rushed screen mixes role evidence, pay, location, authorization, access, sensitive history, unclear process, and an implied but unconfirmed next step. The worked example variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Clarify ambiguous role, level, process, location, schedule, compensation, work sample, and decision criteria before answering. A defensible solution applies Question Clarification, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to screening conversation and process record.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-question-clarification — Clarify ambiguous role, level, process, location, schedule, compensation, work sample, and decision criteria before answering.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-question-clarification
decision-evidence: Clarify ambiguous role, level, process, location, schedule, compensation, work sample, and decision criteria before answering.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Candidates must answer every question immediately to appear prepared. This fails the Question Clarification contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: GitHub Healthy Contributions Guidance (GitHub Docs current 2026-07-15) — Controls README, contribution, conduct, license, support, governance, issue-template, and stewardship signals without equating activity volume with quality.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Clarify ambiguous role, level, process, location, schedule, compensation, work sample, and decision criteria before answering.
